ConnectionStrings.LoggingConnection: Add Connection String if you want to log into a database && add WriteTo section for it!

packages need to be installed for serilo: Serilog.AspNetCore, Serilog.Settings.Configuration, Serilog.Sinks.File, Serilog.Sinks.Console, Serilog.Sinks.PostgreSQL(if you need db logging)

tempJwtSettings.Audience: who is allowed to use it(client domain)
tempJwtSettings.Key: Secret key for jwt signature part, replace it with a strong long random complex secret at least 256 bit(32-char). no dev knows it, only known by server admin
